attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SM_LOSING.CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT_KEY,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SRC_ID,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,-999) AS CLAIM_APRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
'-9999' AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                               
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(TRX_SC.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CLAIM_LOSING_SALES_REP_NUM,
TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE AS CLAIM_REJECTION_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,		
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE AS SPLIT_CLAIM_VALUE_AMT,
TRX_SC.TRX_TYPE AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.LOOSING_VERSION_ID AS CLAIM_LOSING_VERSION_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE AS CLAIM_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SRC_TRX_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS CLAIM_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS LOSING_AGENT_STATUS_NAME,
TRX_SC.PARTNER AS PARTNER_NAME,
TRX_SC.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_DESCR,
'-9999' AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(XAAS_KEY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,-9999) AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'-999' AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
'-9999' AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='MANUAL' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='XAAS' )TRX_SC

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT SM_LOSING
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID=SM_LOSING.SK_TRX_SRC_ID
AND TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SM_LOSING.SRC_TRX_ID_INT
AND TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=SM_LOSING.TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID=TRX_SC.CLAIM_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.LOOSING_NODE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX XAAS_KEY
ON XAAS_KEY.SK_TRX_ID_INT=TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID,NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,NCME.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,
SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCME,
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC TRX_SC
WHERE NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID
AND NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID ORDER BY NCME. LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC,NCME.SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID DESC ) = 1) NCMEVT
ON  NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_BY

SELECT
SM_LOSING.CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT_KEY,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SRC_ID,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,-999) AS CLAIM_APRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
COALESCE(SALES_LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-9999) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                               
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(TRX_SC.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CLAIM_LOSING_SALES_REP_NUM,
TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE AS CLAIM_REJECTION_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,	
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE AS SPLIT_CLAIM_VALUE_AMT,
TRX_SC.TRX_TYPE AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.LOOSING_VERSION_ID AS CLAIM_LOSING_VERSION_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE AS CLAIM_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SRC_TRX_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS CLAIM_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS LOSING_AGENT_STATUS_NAME,
TRX_SC.PARTNER AS PARTNER_NAME,
TRX_SC.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_DESCR,
'-9999' AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
'-9999' AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'-999' AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
'-9999' AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC  WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE IN ('ORDHD','ORDLN'))TRX_SC

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT SM_LOSING
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID=SM_LOSING.SK_TRX_SRC_ID
AND TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SM_LOSING.SRC_TRX_ID_INT
AND TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=SM_LOSING.TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID=TRX_SC.CLAIM_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.LOOSING_NODE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SALES_LINE
ON SALES_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID
AND SALES_LINE.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SALES_LINE.SS_CODE='CG'

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID,NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,NCME.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,
SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCME,
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC TRX_SC
WHERE NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID
AND NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID ORDER BY NCME.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC,NCME.SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID DESC ) = 1) NCMEVT
ON  NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_BY

SELECT
ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_TYPE,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,
ST_TRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.CREATED_BY,
ST_TRX.CREATION_DATE,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID,
ST_TRX.SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
ST_TRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,
ST_TRX.PARTNER,
ST_TRX.OTM_DATE,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11,
ST_TRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC  WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE IN ('ORDHD','ORDLN')) ST_TRX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
WHERE ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SALES_LINE
WHERE ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SALES_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SALES_LINE.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SALES_LINE.SS_CODE='CG'
AND SALES_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCMEVT
WHERE ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID=NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)

UNION

SELECT
ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_TYPE,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,
ST_TRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.CREATED_BY,
ST_TRX.CREATION_DATE,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID,
ST_TRX.SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
ST_TRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,
ST_TRX.PARTNER,
ST_TRX.OTM_DATE,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11,
ST_TRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='WIPS' ) ST_TRX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
WHERE ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_KEY
WHERE COALESCE(ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,-9999)=POS_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCMEVT
WHERE ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID=NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)
UNION

SELECT
ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_TYPE,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,
ST_TRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.CREATED_BY,
ST_TRX.CREATION_DATE,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID,
ST_TRX.SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
ST_TRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,
ST_TRX.PARTNER,
ST_TRX.OTM_DATE,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11,
ST_TRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE  TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='DSV_BKG' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='WIPS') ST_TRX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
WHERE ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE DSV_KEY
WHERE COALESCE(ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,-9999)=DSV_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCMEVT
WHERE ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID=NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)
  
UNION

SELECT
ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_TYPE,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,
ST_TRX.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,
ST_TRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
ST_TRX.CREATED_BY,
ST_TRX.CREATION_DATE,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID,
ST_TRX.SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,
ST_TRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,
ST_TRX.PARTNER,
ST_TRX.OTM_DATE,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11,
ST_TRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='MANUAL' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE<>'XAAS') ST_TRX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
WHERE ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX_TV MANUAL_KEY
WHERE COALESCE(ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,9999)=MANUAL_KEY.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND ST_TRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=MANUAL_KEY.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
AND ST_TRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE=MANUAL_KEY.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND MANUAL_KEY.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCMEVT
WHERE ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID=NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)

ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID,
ST_TRX.SC_ID,
ST_TRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,

ST_TRX.PARTNER,
ST_TRX.OTM_DATE,

ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10,
ST_TRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11,
ST_TRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='MANUAL' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='XAAS' ) ST_TRX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE ST_TRX.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
WHERE ST_TRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT>0)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX XAAS_KEY
WHERE COALESCE(ST_TRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID,-999)=XAAS_KEY.SK_TRX_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCMEVT
WHERE ST_TRX.TRX_SC_ID=NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE ST_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)

SELECT
SM_LOSING.CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT_KEY,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SRC_ID,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,-999) AS CLAIM_APRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
'-9999' AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                               
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(TRX_SC.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CLAIM_LOSING_SALES_REP_NUM,
TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE AS CLAIM_REJECTION_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,	
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE AS SPLIT_CLAIM_VALUE_AMT,
TRX_SC.TRX_TYPE AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.LOOSING_VERSION_ID AS CLAIM_LOSING_VERSION_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE AS CLAIM_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SRC_TRX_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS CLAIM_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS LOSING_AGENT_STATUS_NAME,
TRX_SC.PARTNER AS PARTNER_NAME,
TRX_SC.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_DESCR,
'-9999' AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
'-9999' AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
COALESCE(MANUAL_KEY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY,-999) AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
'-9999' AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='MANUAL' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE<>'XAAS') TRX_SC

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT SM_LOSING
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID=SM_LOSING.SK_TRX_SRC_ID
AND TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SM_LOSING.SRC_TRX_ID_INT
AND TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=SM_LOSING.TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID=TRX_SC.CLAIM_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.LOOSING_NODE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX_TV MANUAL_KEY
ON MANUAL_KEY.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID
AND MANUAL_KEY.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD=TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE
AND MANUAL_KEY.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD=TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE
AND MANUAL_KEY.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID,NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,NCME.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,
SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCME,
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC TRX_SC
WHERE NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID
AND NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID ORDER BY NCME.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC,NCME.SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID DESC ) = 1) NCMEVT
ON  NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_BY

SELECT
SM_LOSING.CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT_KEY,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SRC_ID,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,-999) AS CLAIM_APRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
'-9999' AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                               
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(TRX_SC.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CLAIM_LOSING_SALES_REP_NUM,
TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE AS CLAIM_REJECTION_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,	
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE AS SPLIT_CLAIM_VALUE_AMT,
TRX_SC.TRX_TYPE AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.LOOSING_VERSION_ID AS CLAIM_LOSING_VERSION_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE AS CLAIM_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SRC_TRX_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS CLAIM_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS LOSING_AGENT_STATUS_NAME,
TRX_SC.PARTNER AS PARTNER_NAME,
TRX_SC.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_DESCR,
COALESCE(POS_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,-9999) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
'-9999' AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'-999' AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
'-9999' AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='WIPS' )TRX_SC

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT SM_LOSING
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID=SM_LOSING.SK_TRX_SRC_ID
AND TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SM_LOSING.SRC_TRX_ID_INT
AND TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=SM_LOSING.TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID=TRX_SC.CLAIM_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.LOOSING_NODE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_KEY
ON POS_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID,NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,NCME.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,
SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCME,
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC TRX_SC
WHERE NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID
AND NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID ORDER BY NCME.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC,NCME.SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID DESC ) = 1) NCMEVT
ON  NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_BY

UNION

SELECT
SM_LOSING.CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT_KEY,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SRC_ID,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,-999) AS CLAIM_APRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
'-9999' AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                               
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,		
COALESCE(TRX_SC.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CLAIM_LOSING_SALES_REP_NUM,
TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE AS CLAIM_REJECTION_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,	
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE AS SPLIT_CLAIM_VALUE_AMT,
TRX_SC.TRX_TYPE AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.LOOSING_VERSION_ID AS CLAIM_LOSING_VERSION_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_ORIG_CODE AS CLAIM_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID AS SRC_TRX_ID_INT,
TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD,
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS CLAIM_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCMEVT.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS LOSING_AGENT_STATUS_NAME,
TRX_SC.PARTNER AS PARTNER_NAME,
TRX_SC.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.REJECTION_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_DESCR,
COALESCE(DSV_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,-9999) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
'-9999' AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'-999' AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
'-9999' AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC WHERE  TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='DSV_BKG' AND TRX_ORIG_CODE='WIPS') TRX_SC

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_LOSING_AGENT SM_LOSING
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID=SM_LOSING.SK_TRX_SRC_ID
AND TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SM_LOSING.SRC_TRX_ID_INT
AND TRX_SC.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=SM_LOSING.TRX_SRC_TYPE_CD

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID=TRX_SC.CLAIM_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=TRX_SC.LOOSING_NODE_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE DSV_KEY
ON DSV_KEY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=TRX_SC.SOURCE_TRX_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID,NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,NCME.CLAIM_EVENT_TRX_STATUS_NAME,
SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM_EVENT NCME,
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC TRX_SC
WHERE NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID
AND NCME.CE_ACTN_PNDG_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NCME.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID ORDER BY NCME.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC,NCME.SK_CLAIM_EVENT_ID DESC ) = 1) NCMEVT
ON  NCMEVT.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID = TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATED_BY
